apps.name: AnisFlix
apps.localizedDescription: AnisFlix est votre compagnon de streaming ultime. Regardez vos films, séries et chaînes TV préférés en haute qualité.

versions.localizedDescription: fix(vercel): expose movix via thin api/movix.js + rewrite Vercel did not register the 102KB api/movix-proxy/index.js function (404). Move handler to lib/handlers/ and use a small api/movix.js entry matched by api/*.js; rewrite /api/movix-proxy to /api/movix for existing clients. Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>
